goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'a and b guest house'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 12:45' and should leave on 'friday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '2 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called a and b guest house
Make sure you get star of the hotel and whether they have free parking
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should go to cambridge
The train should leave after 12:45 and should leave on friday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 2 people
Make sure you get the reference number
